title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – CRS Project Fellow
shortInfo: DHGV Sagar CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) post for candidates with M.Sc. or M.E./M.Tech qualifications in relevant disciplines, with applications accepted offline from 25-05-2026 to 09-06-2026 through the official website dhsgsu.edu.in.

basic_details.job_title: DHGV Sagar CRS Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: DHGV Sagar CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) post for candidates with M.Sc. or M.E./M.Tech qualifications in relevant disciplines, with applications accepted offline from 25-05-2026 to 09-06-2026 through the official website dhsgsu.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (not earlier than 3 years) with a minimum of 55% marks in the concerned subject (for Science), M.E. / M. Tech. (not earlier than 3 years) 1st Class (for Engineering)
qualification.details: M.Sc. (not earlier than 3 years) with a minimum of 55% marks in the concerned subject (for Science) or M.E. / M. Tech. (not earlier than 3 years) 1st Class (for Engineering)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DHGV Sagar CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHGV Sagar CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) recruitment is 09-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc. degree with at least 55% marks in the concerned subject or an M.E./M.Tech. degree with 1st Class for Engineering, obtained not earlier than 3 years ago.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 14,000 per month, plus HRA as per rules.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) position.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the DHGV Sagar recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Where is Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya located?
faq.answer: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya is located in Sagar, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 470003.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior-I) position is contractual.

faq.question: Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.
